messages.content:
=Use web_search to find recent (last 7 days) public posts on Hacker News (news.ycombinator.com), Reddit ({{ ($('Read ICP from Sheets').item.json.subreddits || 'SaaS,Entrepreneur,AI_Agents').split(',').map(s => 'r/' + s.trim()).join(', ') }}), and Product Hunt (producthunt.com) where founders or operators are publicly displaying signals matching my ICP. Look for: pain mentions, hiring posts I could solve, complaints about competitors, asks for tools.

Return JSON array, max 30 items, schema:
[
  {
    "person": "@handle or display name",
    "signal_type": "pain | hiring | complaint | tool_ask",
    "source_url": "full URL to the original post",
    "evidence_quote": "verbatim 1-2 sentence quote",
    "score": 0-10,
    "company": "company name if discoverable",
    "company_url": "company website if discoverable"
  }
]
